special_mechanics.name: Gadget System
special_mechanics.description: Players select gadgets at each level with three standard gadgets per character and two selected from a list. Four hidden blueprint gadgets available.

special_mechanics.name: Co-op Mode
special_mechanics.description: Two co-op variants: cooperative mode where Batman and Robin cannot harm each other and share credits, or competitive co-op where they can attack each other with separate credit counts.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay descriptions but no quantified physics parameters. Critical reception noted 'sluggish gameplay' and delayed punch sequences continuing after enemy death, indicating poor movement responsiveness and momentum issues characteristic of the beat-em-up genre implementation.
